headline: Morgan Stanley sends clear message on eBay, Etsy
summary: Wall Street is taking a fresh look at eBay and Etsy, and the conclusions may surprise investors who have written off both companies. In a research note shared with me, Morgan Stanley analysts Nathan Feather and Brian Nowak argue that the market is underestimating how well-positioned both platforms ...

headline: 3 Reasons EBAY is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: eBay has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 21.5%. The stock now trades at $109.19, marking a 27.9% gain. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
